content.raw:
Current work, living systems, and useful experiments

Work

I build community infrastructure, AI learning systems, keynote portals, and cultural field notes for people trying to meet the future without losing the plot. The throughline is simple: humanize technology, make creative work more alive, and turn networks into things people can actually use.

Book a keynote Work with me

Current focus

BC + AI Ecosystem

A province-wide community and industry association for responsible, inclusive, place-rooted AI in British Columbia.

The Upgrade AI

Training, workshops, and applied AI sessions for creative professionals, organizations, community builders, and leadership teams.

Explore services

AI Keynotes

Talks and workshops on AI mindset, creative rebellion, human agency, archives, culture, and leadership after the point of no return.

See speaking topics

Creative Technology + Community

Field-building work across convening, storytelling, media, digital strategy, and relationship-first technology adoption.

Read the backstory

Keynote and project portals

These standalone sites are public extensions of talks, communities, and field work. They carry the graphics, exercises, scripts, prompts, resources, and arguments beyond a single event.

Both Hands Full

A World AI Film Festival keynote portal for filmmakers and creative workers navigating synthetic media, authorship, taste, and responsibility.

Punk Rock AI

A CreativeMornings Vancouver keynote rebuilt as a maker-first portal about agency, taste, and creative rebellion in the AI age.

Developing an AI Mindset

A practical AI adoption resource for teams that need shared language, demos, and a humane first step into the tools.

BC + AI Ecosystem

The public home for events, membership, partner work, resources, and the growing British Columbia AI network.

Selected bodies of work

AI education and adoption

Workshops, keynotes, demos, and custom sessions that help people build confidence without flattening the ethical and creative questions.

Community infrastructure

Convening, association-building, sponsorship, event design, and systems that help networks become durable instead of merely loud.

Photography and media

Decades of documentary, conference, portrait, festival, and movement storytelling across technology, culture, and social change.

Social impact and culture

Work spanning Indigenous-led community projects, youth media, climate gatherings, UN convenings, documentary fieldwork, and civic technology.

Archive highlights

  • UN Global Youth Summit on HIV, Bamako
  • World People's Conference on Climate Change and the Rights of Mother Earth
  • Tribal Journeys / Qatuwas Festival documentation
  • Art Island documentary series
  • Future in Review podcast production
  • Generative AI workshops for artists and teams
  • Midway Island documentary fieldwork
  • Alberta Tar Sands documentary work
  • SkeenaWild youth filmmaking camp
  • Digital Forage / AMES media education
  • Douglas Coupland / Marshall McLuhan documentation
  • EcoArt artist-in-residency teaching in Uganda

Need a speaker, strategist, trainer, or weirdly useful AI collaborator?

Start with the lane that fits: keynotes for rooms that need energy and clarity, services for teams that need applied help, or contact if the project is odd and alive and probably worth a conversation.

Speaking Services Contact

meta.advanced_seo_description: Explore Kris Krüg's work across BC+AI, AI keynotes, community infrastructure, creative technology, training, and visual storytelling.

jetpack-related-posts.title: AI Keynote Speaker Kris Krüg
jetpack-related-posts.author: Kris Krüg
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: AI keynotes, workshops, and culture-shifting rooms AI Keynote Speaker Kris Krüg I help people stop treating AI like a software rollout and start treating it like a cultural shift. My talks mix live demos, field stories, creative rebellion, practical workflows, and the hard questions about power, taste, trust, memory, and…

jetpack-related-posts.title: About Kris Krüg
jetpack-related-posts.author: Kris Krüg
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: My name is Kris Krug – a boundary-pushing Creative Explorer, an intuitive Tech Whisperer, and a tenacious Culture Hacker. In the fabric of the digital era, where technology often overshadows humanity, I've taken it upon myself to chart a different course. I’m on a relentless mission to humanize technology, to…
